required_solution: Either justify exact epsilon=0 as a protected model assumption or add a nonzero-epsilon portal/decay/thermalization scan and recast visible and invisible dark-photon constraints.

affected_outputs: constraint applicability; thermal history; dark scalar lifetime; laboratory limits
description: The backend fixes the Higgs portal exactly to lambda_HP=0, removing scalar mixing, visible scalar decays, and SM thermal contact from the workflow.
required_solution: Either justify exact lambda_HP=0 as part of the model definition or implement portal-dependent scalar mixing, decay widths, and thermalization checks.

affected_outputs: PTArcade MAP; posterior interpretation; mass and beta_lambda inference
description: The PTArcade MAP estimate sits at the physical lower boundary y_D=0, so the posterior should not be interpreted as evidence for an interior Yukawa preference.
required_solution: Report y_D as boundary-sensitive and rerun only if a different prior, one-sided interval treatment, or profile-likelihood boundary analysis is needed.

affected_outputs: PTArcade posterior; credible regions; MAP comparison
description: PTArcade uses a log-uniform prior for v_D over 10^-3.5 to 10 GeV and uniform priors for g_D and y_D; posterior summaries depend on this prior volume.
required_solution: Perform prior-sensitivity reruns only if quantitative model comparison or robust parameter inference is required.

affected_outputs: 1-sigma region interpretation; m_chi estimates; constraint-region mapping; Coleman-Weinberg validity
description: The rectangular PTArcade 1-sigma region contains beta_lambda<0 corners, so rectangular mass ranges include unphysical Coleman-Weinberg points unless a beta_lambda>0 mask is enforced.
required_solution: Apply the beta_lambda>0 mask directly to posterior samples and quote masked credible regions instead of independent rectangular corners.

affected_outputs: alpha; beta/H; Tn; Tp; Treh; PTA spectrum

required_solution: Cross-check key posterior and benchmark points with a full finite-temperature potential and bounce/percolation calculation.

affected_outputs: viability of strongest PTA points; Treh; false-vacuum completion; GW amplitude

affected_outputs: benchmark spectra; PTArcade likelihood; peak amplitude; spectral shape
